channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Trois opérateurs, trois réseaux, un seul prix : les meilleurs forfaits de la semaine sont à moins de 10 euros
item.description: Cette semaine, Free, Syma et YouPrice se démarquent avec trois forfaits mobiles à moins de 10 euros par mois. Chacun s'appuie sur un réseau différent et avance un argument de poids, qu'il s'agisse d'une enveloppe de données massive ou de services inclus.

item.title: A leader’s guide to getting AI right
item.description: How to avoid spending too much on AI and getting little ROI in return. Companies are currently grappling with how to use AI, and results vary. At times it can feel like the blind are leading the blind.

item.title: Workers who do a ‘Sunday reset’ may make $25,000 more a year
item.description: A potential remedy to the ‘Sunday scaries,’ this trend is blowing up social media—helping some to feel more on top of things as they head into the workweek. Sunday has long been regarded as the day of rest: After a week of early wake-ups and diligently checking off to-do lists, there finally comes the one day where doing nothing is not only socially acceptable—but actively encouraged. ...
